title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: MoonShot AI released Kimi K2.6, a language model optimized for coding tasks and agent swarm applications. The model represents maturation in Chinese AI labs' LLM offerings with improvements over its K2.5 predecessor.
